meta.title: Industries — PT Victorindo Kimiatama
meta.description: From automotive factories to offshore platforms — VK powers 6 industrial verticals with proven coating solutions and a nationwide project portfolio.

hero.heading: Powering Diverse Industries
hero.lede: From automotive factories to offshore platforms — specialized coating systems proven across six industrial verticals.

items.title: Automotive & Bus Bodyworks
items.desc: OEM manufacturers, bus bodyworks, car assembly plants, and automotive refinish workshops.

items.title: Construction & Real Estate
items.desc: Residential housing, commercial buildings, malls, hotels, hospitals, and large infrastructure projects.

items.title: Manufacturing & Industrial
items.desc: Factory floors, machinery, steel structures, manufacturing equipment, and industrial facilities.

items.title: Oil, Gas & Petrochemical
items.desc: Offshore platforms, storage tanks, pipelines, chemical processing plants, and marine vessels.

items.title: Public Transportation
items.desc: TransJakarta buses, commuter trains, rail systems, and mass transit vehicle coating solutions.

items.title: Heavy Industry & Infrastructure
items.desc: Steel fabrication, industrial structures, power plants, water treatment facilities, and more.

portfolio.heading: Our Work Speaks for Itself
portfolio.lede: A selection of projects delivered with VK coating systems — across automotive, marine, industrial, and architectural applications.

items.title: Wuling EV Vehicles
items.desc: Technical support and refinish coating application for consistent repair quality.

items.desc: Providing reliable refinish coating systems and technical assistance.

items.title: New Armada Bodyworks

items.title: Laksana Bodyworks
items.desc: Delivering end-to-end coating solutions for bus manufacturing applications.

items.title: Marine Coating
items.desc: Marine coating for barges with superior durability and corrosion protection.

items.title: Oil Refinery
items.desc: Protective coating solutions for oil refineries, ensuring durability and corrosion resistance.

items.title: LPG Gas Coating
items.desc: Specialized coating for 3kg LPG cylinders with heat resistance and durability requirements.
items.imageAlt: Painter spray-coating a 3kg LPG cylinder in the coating booth

items.title: Chemical Tank Lining
items.desc: Protective tank lining for chemical storage, ensuring superior chemical resistance and durability.

items.title: Danone Warehouse
items.desc: High-performance floor and wall coating system for a large industrial warehouse facility.
items.imageAlt: High-gloss epoxy floor inside the Danone warehouse

items.title: Structure Painting
items.desc: Anti-corrosion coating system for industrial pipe structures and mechanical installations.

items.title: Hotel Architectural
items.desc: Premium interior and exterior architectural coating for Swiss-Belinn Hotel, Cikarang.
